title: Sewer Hydraulic Design Velocities and Cover (UGSS)
text_english: Sewer pipelines and structures shall be DESIGNED for the following hydraulic envelopes: (i) MINIMUM VELOCITY at INITIAL PEAK FLOW = {{v_min_initial}} (default 0.6) m/s; (ii) MINIMUM VELOCITY at ULTIMATE PEAK FLOW = {{v_min_ultimate}} (default 0.8) m/s; (iii) MAXIMUM VELOCITY = {{v_max}} (default 3.0) m/s. The sewers SHALL be DESIGNED on the assumption that although silting may occur at minimum flow, it shall be FLUSHED OUT during peak flows. MINIMUM COVER of {{min_cover_m}} (default 1.0) METRE for sewers SHALL be MAINTAINED below ground level to the TOP of pipe. Population basis: {{pop_2021}} lakh (current); {{pop_design}} lakh (design year {{design_year}}); {{pop_ultimate}} lakh (ultimate {{ultimate_year}}). Per-capita sewage = {{lpcd}} LPCD; return factor = {{return_factor_pct}}%; infiltration provision = {{infiltration_pct}}%.

parameters.name: v_min_initial
parameters.label: Min Velocity at Initial Peak Flow (m/s)

parameters.name: v_min_ultimate
parameters.label: Min Velocity at Ultimate Peak Flow (m/s)
